title: calystegia soldanella var. australis
intro: Calystegia soldanella var. australis, also known as the Australian morning glory, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Calystegia soldanella var. australis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
